title: Neil Bresnan
compiled_truth: Neil Bresnan is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-09-11 to 2001-12-04), Neil Bresnan sent 27 and received 785 emails, totalling 812 interactions. Top correspondents: [Chris Stokley](people/chris-stokley) (23), [Jeff Richter](people/jeff-richter) (10), [Stewart Rosman](people/stewart-rosman) (4), [Phillip Platter](people/phillip-platter) (4), [Kate Symes](people/kate-symes) (3).
